title: Administration Trump says there will ‘likely be more’ American deaths in Iran before conflict ends by Max Rego - 03\/01\
raw_response:
{"rating": 0.0, "lean": "Center", "explanation": "This is a news report. The author's own prose is primarily straightforward narration and neutral framing of events, with details attributed to official sources; no consistent left or right ideological slant is evident.
